variables.notes: Candidate list is empty. 'Merchandise' appears to be the direct cost/cost of sales line and is the best available COGS proxy, but this requires manual review because the label is not explicit.

candidates.why: Closest income-statement R&D-related line; may represent development spend being capitalized rather than expensed R&D.

candidates.why: Supplemental amortization line, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized Development Cost - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment

variables.notes: No explicit 'Research and development' expense line is shown. 'Capitalised development expenditure' is the closest R&D-related income statement line, but it may reflect capitalized development spending rather than expensed R&D, so manual review is warranted.

candidates.why: Best available finance-cost line with populated values; acceptable fallback when explicit interest expense is unavailable.
Explicit interest label is preferred conceptually, but preview shows no values; still useful as priority option if populated in some years.

variables.notes: Priority list: explicit interest expense first, then broader financial expenses as fallback.
